patches.hypothesis: The refined fix addresses overfitting by ensuring that the method correctly handles cases where creators are not explicitly marked but have the same annotations. It also includes proper null checks and boundary conditions to handle general cases of creator duplication.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug occurs because the method incorrectly identifies duplicate creators even when they are not explicitly marked and have the same annotations (both null). The check should consider whether both creators are explicitly marked or not before throwing an exception.

patches.hypothesis: The bug arises because the method incorrectly throws an exception when two constructors for the same class are encountered, even if they are not explicitly annotated. The fix should allow overriding of non-explicit constructors with other non-explicit constructors.

patches.hypothesis: The refined fix will introduce logic to compare the specificity of the new and old constructors. It will ensure that explicitly annotated constructors are not overridden by non-explicit ones and handle cases where the new constructor is more specific or generic compared to the old one.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug occurs because the method incorrectly throws an exception when two constructors for the same class are encountered, even if they are not explicitly annotated. The fix should allow non-explicitly annotated constructors to be overridden without throwing an exception.

patches.hypothesis: The original patch incorrectly restricts overriding behavior to only explicitly annotated constructors. The refined fix ensures that non-explicitly annotated constructors can override each other, while still handling cases where one or both constructors are explicitly annotated.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug occurs because the method incorrectly throws an exception when two constructors for the same type are encountered, even if they are not explicitly annotated. The fix should allow overriding non-explicitly annotated constructors with other non-explicitly annotated constructors.

patches.hypothesis: The original patch incorrectly allowed overriding if the new constructor was not explicitly marked, which can lead to unexpected behavior. The refined patch will add checks to ensure the new constructor is more specific than the existing one before allowing an override.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug arises because the method incorrectly throws an exception when two constructors for the same class are encountered, even if they are not explicitly marked. The fix should allow overriding if the new constructor is not explicitly marked.

patches.hypothesis: The refined fix will address the overfitting by ensuring that creators of the same class can only be overridden if the new creator is explicitly marked. Additionally, it will handle the scenario where one creator is more specific than the other, preferring the more specific one.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug arises because the method incorrectly identifies duplicate creators even when they have the same class and no explicit annotations. The fix should allow overriding creators if they are of the same class without throwing an exception.
